note: Hybrid realism: the DOCX structure, section ordering, and bullet conventions mirror real senior-engineer resumes; the JD uses real industry terms (PostgreSQL, Kafka, Kubernetes, OpenTelemetry, eBPF, Rust). Names, employers, and quantified claims are synthetic because public resumes cannot be redistributed without consent.

entries.description: Mid-level backend engineer resume in authentic DOCX structure (Jordan Chen, fictional). Six years of Python/Go backend experience with quantified bullets.
Senior Backend Engineer JD modelled on real public postings (checkout/payments + Kubernetes + event streams). Company fictitious; technical requirements are real.
